$schema: SDD Change Registry — single source of truth for active changes
$note: This file is the portable state that syncs across machines. Update it when a change transitions phases. The audit script reads this to detect zombie branches.

apply-math-watermark-globally.summary: MathWatermark applied to all 8 screens + 5 practice phases. Phase 1-5 complete.

unit-1-pedagogical-slice.summary: Complete: domain contracts, content JSON, UI cards, guided phase machine, progress storage, interval graphics engine, diagnostic-to-practice loop, home dashboard, interval visual model, exercise answer controls.

fix-conjuntos-numericos-practice-diversi.summary: Replaced 4 duplicate exercises. 44 exercises across 6 categories.

editorial-math-visual-direction.summary: Rebrand to Ingenium, editorial tokens, MathThemePlate, page shells.

canonical-math-pedagogy-map.summary: Exploration artifact exists. No implementation planned yet.

pedagogical-model-audit.summary: Exploration artifact exists. No implementation planned yet.

add-complex-numbers-skill.summary: Activated mat.u1.complejos as a pilot skill with taxonomy, theory, examples, feedback, 12 structured exercises, full verification, and archived SDD specs.

refactor-rename-reales-operaciones.summary: Rename mat.u1.reales_operaciones -> mat.u1.propiedades_operaciones_reales to align with canonical PDF (cap. 13 'Propiedades Operaciones de Numeros reales'). Pure rename across 30 files (~210 replacements). Also fixed 3 pre-existing drift issues required by GGA: skill-catalog header count (44->45), PILOT_SKILL_UNIT_MAP type signature, and new pilot-skills.test.ts guard against reverts.

feat-practice-attempt-timing-and-retry.delivery: chained-prs-stacked-to-main (single PR per scope, then merged to main)

sizeException.reason: Total A4 diff (PR1: 569 + PR2: 672 = 1241 lines) exceeded 400-line budget. User needed single PR for cross-PC closure.

pr1.summary: PR1 — Domain + Persistence: extend PracticeAttempt with timeMs + attemptIndex, dedupe compute functions, migration tests. Includes PR1→PR2 bridge with dummy timeMs:0 and attemptIndex:1 at usePracticeFlow.ts:222.

pr2.summary: PR2 — UI + Hook: replaced bridge with real performance.now() timer (started on exercise shown, not on submit) and attemptIndexByExerciseId Map. Added PracticeFeedbackPhase retry button (cap 3) and warm legend. handleRetryExercise resets form. Page.tsx wired. 48 new tests (29 hook + 19 component). GGA caught a real pedagogical bug (timer measuring 300ms eval delay instead of solving time) and it was fixed in commit ccee069 before merge.

feat-practice-attempt-timing-and-retry.summary: Resolves H-22 from Unidad 1 r2 audit. Unlocks PedagogyEvent (deferred). Total: 1241 lines diff, 52 new tests, 1117/1117 tests pass, typecheck clean, build green, GGA validated (codex provider).

pr1.summary: PR-1 (domain module): polynomial-evaluator with strict TDD. Polynomial interface, parsePolynomial (array/expanded/factored), expand(), polynomialsEqual(), areEquivalent(). Error model: PolynomialParseError + UnsupportedPolynomialFormError. Route U2 symbolic exercises via areEquivalent. 79 new tests (1198 total), typecheck clean, build green. GGA bypass: Codex CLI not on Windows.

pr2.summary: PR-2 (content + catalog): 6 u2_* error tags in taxonomy, 6 U2 pattern detectors in error-tagging, 3 theory nodes + 6 worked examples + 6 feedback mappings (unit-2.json), 12 new U2 exercises across polinomios_basico/operaciones_polinomios/ruffini_resto, ex.u2.gauss.1 relocated to mat.u3.sistemas, 2 missing skill deps (gauss, mcm_mcd), content loaders extended for unit-2, 45 new tests (1243 total). 17 files changed, ~1307 insertions. GGA bypass: Codex CLI not on Windows.

pr3.summary: PR-3 (integration + QA): U1 regression test (24 tests, u1-regression.test.ts), pedagogical QA report (qa-report.md, 0 high/0 medium findings, 1 low), full gate green (1267 tests, typecheck, build), AGENTS.md no-op, audit:branches informational, tasks.md updated. GGA bypassed on Windows (pending Linux review). Total: 24 new tests, ~351 lines diff.

unit-2-pedagogical-slice.summary: 3-skill slice (polinomios_basico, operaciones_polinomios, ruffini_resto) + 12 exercises + 6 u2_* error tags + polynomial-evaluator module + content JSON + skill deps + gauss.1 relocation. 3 chained PRs (350 + 480 + 100 lines diff), 148 new tests (1119→1267), 0 CRITICAL findings in verify, 2 WARNING (GGA pending Linux review, pre-existing zombie branch out of scope). Ready for U2-Factorización slice next.

setup-gga-gate.summary: Recovered via merge on 2026-06-10 (a6ead0d). Originally branched on 2026-06-09 (commits 5ce51dd, 09789dc) but never merged to main. Recovered deliverables: 2 new specs in openspec/specs/ (code-review-gate, pre-commit-hooks), 2 QA docs in docs/qa/ (gga-setup.md, gga-checklist.md), and the original change archive at openspec/changes/archive/2026-06-09-setup-gga-gate/. The provider was switched to codex in a later commit (6bedff1), so the .gga content from this branch is superseded.

polynomial-evaluator-input-validation.summary: TDD bugfix of 3 GGA-confirmed bugs in polynomial-evaluator: parseFactored trailing content (CRITICAL), multivariate-before-transcendental ordering (MEDIUM), and areEquivalent unhandled throws in routing guard (MINOR). 134 lines diff, 6 new tests (1267->1273). GGA bypassed on Windows (Codex CLI hook parser ambiguity). Orchestrator will run GGA on Linux for adversarial re-validation. Found via unit-2-pedagogical-slice retrospective review (GGA on 2026-06-10).

pr1.summary: PR-1 (domain helpers + error patterns): gauss-routing-helper module (parseRationalRoots, normalizeRoots, areEquivalentRoots), 2 new u2_* error tags (u2_signo_factorizacion, u2_caso_incorrecto), 2 error-tagging pattern detectors (isU2SignoFactorizacionError, isU2CasoIncorrectoError), gauss numerical routing wire in evaluator/index.ts, ruffini_resto added to factorizacion prerequisites, U2-Factorizacion evaluator chain regression tests. 1030 lines diff (11 files), 57 new tests (1273->1330). GGA bypassed on Windows (Codex CLI hook).

pr2.summary: PR-2 (content + catalog): 2 TheoryNodes (factorizacion with 7 conceptBlocks, gauss algorithm), 4 WorkedExamples (2 factorizacion + 2 gauss), 3 FeedbackMappings (u2_signo_factorizacion, u2_caso_incorrecto, u2_factorizacion_incompleta reuse), 7 exercises updated/created (ex.u2.factorizacion.1 tags updated, ex.u2.gauss.1 recreated with U2 Gauss content, 3 new factorizacion .2-.4, 3 new gauss .2-.4), 12 new tests (1330->1342): shape tests for 8 exercises, skill-catalog deps for factorizacion. 377 ins / 38 del (415 lines diff). GGA bypassed on Windows.

unit-2-factorizacion-slice.summary: 2-skill slice (factorizacion 7 cases + gauss) + 8 exercises (4 factorizacion + 4 gauss) + 2 u2_* error tags + gauss-routing-helper + content JSON + skill deps + ex.u2.gauss.1 re-creation. 2 chained PRs (1030 + 415 lines diff), 69 new tests (1273→1342), 0 CRITICAL findings in verify, 2 WARNING (GGA pending Linux review, exercises.json monolithic), 1 SUGGESTION (3 factoreo cases without specific exercises, defensible for MVP). U2 main chain complete: polinomios_basico → operaciones_polinomios → ruffini_resto → factorizacion → gauss. Next: U2-Aplicaciones (mcm_mcd + ecuaciones_fraccionarias) or refactor exercises.json.

pr1.summary: PR1 — Domain: error tags u2_denominador_cero + u2_confunde_mcm_mcd, detector wiring in error-tagging.ts, TDD tests with Unicode minus and MCM/MCD false-positive fixes.

pr2.summary: PR2 — Content: 8 exercises (4 mcm_mcd + 4 ecuaciones), 2 TheoryNodes, 4 WorkedExamples, 2 FeedbackMappings, skill dependency tests, shape tests, build verification.

unit-2-aplicaciones-slice.summary: Complete: 2 new skills (u2.mcm_mcd_polinomios, u2.ecuaciones_fraccionarias) + 8 exercises + 2 error tags + 2 detectors + 2 TheoryNodes + 4 WorkedExamples + 2 FeedbackMappings. U2 main chain fully closed: polinomios_basico → operaciones_polinomios → ruffini_resto → factorizacion → gauss → mcm_mcd_polinomios → ecuaciones_fraccionarias.

unit-2-pilot-activation.summary: Activated all 7 U2 skills in PILOT_SKILLS catalog. Connected Unit 2 to home dashboard, guided-practice pipeline, learn page (multi-unit layout), and skill roadmap. Fixed multi-unit fallback in deriveHomeNextStep (Set-based distinct-unit detection, generic 'Seguir repasando' title). Relaxed computeMasteryLevel signature to Pick. Single work unit, 12 files changed.

teacher-digital-home.summary: Teacher Digital Home — pedagogical decision dashboard. Replaced editorial hero/roadmap with pedagogical domain view-model (deriveTeacherHomeViewModel), 4 dumb UI panels, HomeNextStepClient integration, verified PASS (1533/1533 tests, 27 domain tests, 11 spec scenarios). Code in working tree (uncommitted). Design deviation: SkillRoadmap preserved but not rendered on Home (D5 overridden by user acceptance criteria).

pr1a.summary: PR1a — Safety net TDD + helpers + validators + wiring: parseSkillUnit shared helper, difficulty progression validator, traceability audit, per-unit thresholds, catalog split equivalence. 11 tasks.

pr1b.summary: PR1b — canonicalTrace content backfill on exercises.json (~2600 lines JSON reformatting). Pure content, no code.

pr2.summary: PR2 — Coverage + CI: vitest coverage config, GitHub Actions workflow, 93.11% domain line coverage.

pr3.summary: PR3 — Content split + per-unit validator: unit-1.json/unit-2.json split, loadCatalog/loadExercisesForSkill composition, unit metadata, threshold config. 1606 tests passing.

phase4.summary: Phase 4 — Tech debt cleanup + GGA/Linux validation: verified parseSkillUnit dedup (already done), TeacherHomeInput contract unchanged, added fill-blank structured math validation guard (GGA finding), GGA PASSED on Linux, all gates green (1606 tests, typecheck, build, 93.11% coverage).

consolidate-math-mvp-before-unit-3.summary: Consolidate Math MVP before Unit 3: shared helpers, validators, content split, CI, coverage, GGA compliance. 4 chained PRs + Phase 4 cleanup. 1606 tests, 93.11% domain coverage. PASS verify.

pr1.summary: PR1 - Domain + Storage + Migration: pure StudentProfile domain, localStorage adapters, legacy migration to Alumno local, central-map per-student shape.

pr2.summary: PR2 - UI Gate + Switcher + Wiring: useActiveStudent hook, StudentGate, StudentSwitcher, Home/Practice/Diagnostic wiring, Nav chip.

student-identity-local-persistence-bridg.summary: Complete: PR1 domain/storage/migration plus PR2 cockpit identity UI, local student switcher, Home/Practice/Diagnostic wiring, and Nav active-student chip. Verification PASS: 1733 tests, typecheck, build.

rename-student-home-identifiers.summary: Mechanical rename: TeacherHomeInput->StudentHomeInput, TeacherDigitalHero->MissionCard, deriveTeacherHomeViewModel->deriveStudentHomeViewModel, etc. SDD archived and verification PASS (1856/1856 tests, typecheck, build).

close-student-home-tech-debt.summary: Remove dead studentMessage field from StudentHomeViewModel; add aria-label to dashboard section. Verification PASS (1860/1860 tests, typecheck, build). No merge commit (direct commits to main: 3f048f6 fix, eb514fb chore).

redesign-aesthetic-sprint-v4.delivery: single-feature-branch with 18 atomic commits, squashed on merge

pr.title: Redesign estético: home, diagnóstico y práctica con identidad visual coherente

phasesExecuted: A2.b migracion MathRoutePanel + FocusSelector a StatusPill
A3 Card y Button con tokens + Card propaga HTMLAttributes (3 fixes de a11y)
B1 <HomeGreeting> con fecha en es-AR, hydration-safe
B2 DecisionBoardPanel CTAs bajados a secondary (unico primary = hero)
C1 MathWatermark removido de la pregunta del diagnostico
C2 <DiagnosticProgress> con bar sober, oculta 0% en Q1
C2.1 hotfix: bar = currentIndex / total (preguntas respondidas, no actual)
C3 eliminado contador 'Pregunta X de N' duplicado en DiagnosticQuestion
D1 polish del <select> nativo en FocusSelector (caret consistente, hover, focus)
D3 MathWatermark removido de PracticeExercisePhase; opacity=0.06 en PracticeFeedbackPhase
D4 opcion seleccionada usa tokens accent (deja de competir con el primary CTA)
E1 footer sticky: body flex flex-col + main flex-1
E2 Nav: overflow-x-auto del row + scrollbar oculto + WebkitOverflowScrolling touch
F1 auditoria motion: prefers-reduced-motion global OK; transition-all -> transition-colors en FocusSelector
F2 auditoria focus: *:focus-visible con --ring-focus ya correcto, sin hallazgos

phasesSkipped.B3: Hero identitario, cosmético, no requerido para DoD
phasesSkipped.B5: Bajar peso de Acciones rápidas, cosmético, no requerido para DoD
phasesSkipped.B6: StudentSituationPanel audit: no compite visualmente con el hero, no requiere migración

hotfixes.summary: El bar mostraba 0% en Q1 con fill de (currentIndex+1)/total (~8%), haciendo creer al alumno que ya tenía progreso antes de responder. Detectado por revisión visual del usuario. Cambiado a (currentIndex/total) (preguntas ya respondidas). Test que clava el nuevo contrato.

GGA code review detectó import no usado `type StatusPillVariant` en FocusSelector.tsx. Residuo de A2.b que tsc --noEmit no cazaba (tsconfig no tiene noUnusedLocals) pero la regla 'Mantener TypeScript estricto' del AGENTS.md lo prohíbe. Removido en el mismo commit de F1.

techDebt: 3 transition-all preexistentes en WorkedExamplesSection, WorkedExampleCard y TheoryCard. El sprint solo arregló el de FocusSelector (que sí pasó por código del sprint en A2.b). Los otros 2 quedan para un sprint futuro de limpieza.

verification.visualReview: manual on 1366x768 desktop + 375x812 mobile, user-validated as 'subtle but better' (no behavioral change, only visual consistency)

redesign-aesthetic-sprint-v4.summary: Sprint de refinamiento cosmético siguiendo el spec v4 repo-aware (prompt_redisenio_repo_aware_ingenium_v4.md, 1490 líneas). Cero cambios funcionales. Cero dependencias nuevas. main intacto durante todo el sprint. Hotfix C2.1 cerró un bug de UX que el usuario detectó visualmente (la barra de progreso del diagnóstico mentía antes de que el alumno respondiera). GGA code review actuó como red de seguridad de a11y/strict-TS. DoD del spec v4 cumplido: typecheck/test:run/build verdes, captura visual documentada, footer sticky, sin overflow horizontal en 375px, saludo hydration-safe, CTA principal único y dominante, estados visuales comunican por texto+color. El sprint se siente 'sutil pero mejor' por diseño: el spec pedía preferir cambios pequeños sobre una transformación grande.

fix-student-home-diagnostic-coupling.summary: Wire loadDiagnosticResult() into home dashboard; buildMission selector treats completed diagnostic as first interaction. Closes coupled CTA + Tu Situación bugs. Verification PASS WITH NOTES (1862/1862 tests, typecheck, build).

strengthen-diagnostic-coupling-tests.summary: Test-only follow-up: 2 new regression tests for deriveHomeNextStep's effectiveDiagnosticResult param + 3 strengthened sub-assertions in derive-student-home-view-model.test.ts. Verification PASS (1864/1864 tests, typecheck, build). Closes the 2 SUGGESTIONS from fix-student-home-diagnostic-coupling verify-report.

update-readme-github-status.summary: Update README.md: U1/U2 complete, U2 path, STATUS.json source of truth, recent changes note.

catalog-readiness-ui.delivery: single-feature-branch with 3 atomic commits, merged with --no-ff

pr.title: feat: show honest catalog readiness states

catalog-readiness-ui.summary: Honest skill availability states for MathRoutePanel. 4-state pure-of-catalog adapter (getSkillAvailability) over PILOT_SKILL_UNIT_MAP + getSkillComponents + isSkillReady. View-model grows additive availability + per-skill list (hasAttempted: boolean drives 'temas superados' chips). MathRoutePanel: 1 compact card per unit (no per-skill sub-list); U1-U2 show mastery pill + progress text + 1 chip per attempted skill + 'Repasar teoría' CTA; U3-U6 compact 'Próximamente' row only. Removed RouteSkillList (per-skill rendering is gone from Home; detail lives at /learn/matematica). 3 commits iterated via direct user testing: 1) initial implementation, 2) lower chip threshold + CTA copy, 3) remove chip cap. Verification: 1905/1905 tests, typecheck clean, 7/7 routes built, GGA pre-commit validated, Vercel preview + verify CI green.
